subcodes.first_line: Sorrows have encompassed Us through that which the hands of them that have disbelieved in the All-Merciful have wrought - they who perceived not the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد احاطتنا الاحزان بما اکتسبت ایادی الذین کفروا بالرحمن الذین ماوجدوا رائحه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
